description: Aquatic: Fish Morphus table (Nightbane Survival Guide, WB5, pp. 78–79). Nightbane with a Fish Morphus have an affinity for fish or fishing. All rows grant Swimming at 98%, indefinite underwater breathing, labored breathing of air on land, and depth tolerance of 1,000 feet (305 m) unless a row states otherwise.

entries.name: Full Fish Form
entries.description: The Morphus is a large fish of any species, 6–9 feet (1.8 to 2.7 m) long, with full fish features, and flops on dry land without hands, arms, legs, or feet.
customOneOffs: Helpless on land (attacks per melee round, P.P., and Spd are all reduced to two) unless another means of locomotion exists.
Cannot manipulate objects even with the mouth.
Transportation on land may be a problem for this cold, slippery, large, heavy character.

entries.name: Fish Man
entries.description: A humanoid Morphus with arms, hands, legs, and feet, but a fish head with gills and large round eyes, a scaled body, and a large dorsal fin. Color may vary from dull freshwater tones to brilliant tropical patterns.
customOneOffs: Weight and size may be a problem on land and for transportation.

entries.name: Bioluminescence
entries.description: Looks entirely human at first glance, but closer inspection shows fine scales and translucent skin with visible veins. The character can glow like a deep-sea fish. Glow radiates from the hands, arms, neck, and chest, or from small globes on 1D4 short stalks above the head. Glow radius is 20 feet (6.1 m).

variantPercentiles.label: Uncontrolled Glow
variantPercentiles.description: The character glows the entire time in Morphus form.
customOneOffs: Prowling and hiding in the dark are impossible.

variantPercentiles.label: Controlled Glow
variantPercentiles.description: Can turn the glow on and off and control intensity from a soft glow to mild bright light.
customOneOffs: Prowling is impossible while glowing unless concealed.

entries.name: Scaly Skin
entries.description: Otherwise human looking, but covered in fish scales. Color may vary from dull freshwater tones to brilliant tropical patterns. Small ears; otherwise human in appearance.

variantPercentiles.label: Hair
variantPercentiles.description: The character has hair on the head.

customOneOffs: +1 to escape from wrestling holds and entanglement attacks.

entries.name: Puffer Fish Skin
entries.description: Loose skin covered with small spines that lay harmlessly against the skin when not in use. The Nightbane can inflate the torso, arms, hands, neck, and head like a puffer fish, tripling size (maximum 10 feet / 3 m) and exposing cutting spines.
customOneOffs: Spiny punch does normal punch damage +6.
Puffer defense does 3D6 damage per action in which someone attacks, touches, or tries to move the character.
+2 to Horror Factor only when the skin is inflated.
Must remove clothing from the upper torso when inflating.

entries.name: Gills
entries.description: Looks almost entirely human except for a large pair of gills under the jaw line, making the face appear slightly monstrous.
customOneOffs: Gills are easy to conceal with a scarf or high collar.

entries.name: Piranha Jaws (and Nature)
entries.description: Wide, oversized mouth without lips and a mouth full of narrow, jagged teeth (twice as many as a normal human). Enjoys the taste of blood and raw meat.
customOneOffs: Tends to be a bit jumpy.
